CLOUD-BUSTER_SWORD.description: At the start of your turn, gain 5 Limit and 1 ATB.
CLOUD-BUSTER_SWORD.title: Buster Sword
CLOUD-ULTIMA_WEAPON.description: At the start of your turn, gain 7 Limit and 1 ATB. Upgrade Limit Break.
CLOUD-ULTIMA_WEAPON.title: Ultima Weapon
CLOUD-FUSION_SWORD.title: Fusion Sword
CLOUD-ODIN_MATERIA.description: Obtain [gold]Zantetsuken[/gold]. You can now summon [gold]Odin[/gold]. Start combat with [gold]Punisher Mode[/gold].
CLOUD-ODIN_MATERIA.title: Odin Materia
CLOUD-RUNE_BLADE.description: Increase [gold]Magic[/gold] damage by [blue]20%[/gold] while in [gold]Operator Mode[/gold].
CLOUD-RUNE_BLADE.title: Rune Blade
CLOUD-BAHAMUT_MATERIA.description: You can now summon [gold]Bahamut[/gold]. Gain 20 [gold]Summon[/gold] at the start of combat.
CLOUD-BAHAMUT_MATERIA.title: Bahamut Materia
